summary: Done: added ttl param (last in both signatures), Cache.set_ttl() method, module-level set_ttl() helper exported in __all__, TTL-aware get()/put() logic and expire() lazy purge on miss. My changes don't overlap your compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy work since we appear to be in separate environments (my working tree only shows my diff, not yours) - each of us likely submits our own patch.txt independently, so no merge action needed on my end.
